overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban environment. The player moves through a covered neon-lit walkway, transitions through a colonnade, visits a convenience store, and continues down a commercial street with overhead transit lines. The scene features ray-traced lighting, wet reflective surfaces, and dense cyberpunk architecture mixing modern glass with older brick structures.

mature trees lining the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban pedestrian walkway with wet reflective pavement. Neon signs including a prominent PURE OVERKILL billboard illuminate the right side, while a modern glass building rises on the left. The player walks forward past sparse pedestrian traffic including a woman in a yellow dress examining a display and a man approaching from the opposite direction.

approaching bright exit of colonnade into sunlit plaza

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dark, enclosed colonnade with massive structural columns flanking both sides. Artificial lights line the ceiling as the player walks toward a bright exit visible in the distance. The environment shifts from the semi-covered walkway to this tunnel-like passage before emerging into daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with convenience store and open pedestrian space

approaching the entrance of the 25h/7 convenience store

trees planted in the open plaza area providing shade

open paved area with sunlight and shadows

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark colonnade into bright sunlight, the scene opens into an urban plaza. A convenience store with distinctive cyan neon 25h/7 signage sits on the left, while older brick architecture lines the right. The player walks across the open paved space toward the store entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk convenience store interior with magazine racks

events.description: entering the 25h/7 convenience store through glass doors
turning to examine magazine racks on the right side of the store
exiting the convenience store back to the plaza

segments.scene_description: The player enters the convenience store, transitioning from bright daylight to the artificially lit interior. Inside, magazine racks line the right wall while a store clerk stands behind the central counter. The player examines the merchandise including magazine displays before turning and exiting back to the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with overhead transit infrastructure

segments.scene_description: Exiting the store, the player enters a bustling commercial city street with parked cars lining the right side and overhead transit rails spanning above. Large digital billboards including one for EL GUAPO adorn the buildings. The player continues walking along the sidewalk, passing other pedestrians and street trees while heading deeper into the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit pedestrian walkway through a dark passage and into a bright, bustling commercial district. It begins on wet reflective pavement beneath a PURE OVERKILL billboard, moving past sparse pedestrians and modern glass architecture. The scene then shifts into a dark, enclosed colonnade with massive structural columns, creating a tunnel-like transition before emerging into the bright sunlight of an urban plaza. As the camera approaches a convenience store marked by cyan neon signage, it briefly enters the artificially lit interior to pass magazine racks and a clerk before turning back toward the daylight. Finally, the view expands onto a wide city street lined with parked cars and overhead transit rails, moving past EL GUAPO billboards and street trees deeper into the urban environment.
